nasb.text: May there be abundance of grain in the earth on top of the mountains; Its fruit will wave like the cedars of Lebanon; And may those from the city flourish like vegetation of the earth.

esv.text: May there be abundance of grain in the land; on the tops of the mountains may it wave; may its fruit be like Lebanon; and may people blossom in the cities like the grass of the field!

cnv.text: 願地上五穀豐登， 山頂上也都豐收； 願地上的果實茂盛，像黎巴嫩山的樹林， 願城裡的人繁衍，好像地上的青草。

ccb.text: 愿遍地五谷丰登， 山顶上出产丰富， 如黎巴嫩的密林。 愿各城人口稠密如原野的青草。

csbs.text: 愿五谷在大地、在群山的顶上丰盛； 愿它们的果实晃动，如同黎巴嫩的香柏树； 愿城中人丁兴旺，如同地上的牧草。
